title: 4th court appearance for Van Druten as bail hearing ties up
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Bevan van Druten (53),...
bodyText: [{"type":"contributor","text":"Marguerite van Ginkel","contributorName":"Marguerite van Ginkel","contributorDate":"Friday, 06 February 2026, 08:47"},{"type":"intro_bold","text":"George Herald will once again apply to film the proceedings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Bevan van Druten (53), accused of murdering his girlfriend, Nicky van Heerden (54), is due back in the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court today, 6 February, for his fourth appearance in the matter.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Bevan van Druten (53), accused of murdering his girlfriend, Nicky van Heerden (54), is due back in the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court today, 6 February, for his fourth appearance in the matter."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The court is expected to conclude the bail hearing and deliver a ruling on the State’s application for him to undergo psychiatric evaluation at Valkenberg Psychiatric Hospital in Cape Town."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Van Druten remains in custody pending the outcome of his bail application.","html":"Van Druten remains in custody pending the outcome of his bail application."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George Herald will once again apply to film the proceedings.","html":"George Herald will once again apply to film the proceedings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Follow the paper’s online platforms for updates and the latest developments from court.","html":"Follow the paper’s online platforms for updates and the latest developments from court."}]
bodyHtml: [{"type":"contributor","text":"Marguerite van Ginkel","contributorName":"Marguerite van Ginkel","contributorDate":"Friday, 06 February 2026, 08:47"},{"type":"intro_bold","text":"George Herald will once again apply to film the proceedings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Bevan van Druten (53), accused of murdering his girlfriend, Nicky van Heerden (54), is due back in the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court today, 6 February, for his fourth appearance in the matter.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Bevan van Druten (53), accused of murdering his girlfriend, Nicky van Heerden (54), is due back in the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court today, 6 February, for his fourth appearance in the matter."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The court is expected to conclude the bail hearing and deliver a ruling on the State’s application for him to undergo psychiatric evaluation at Valkenberg Psychiatric Hospital in Cape Town."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Van Druten remains in custody pending the outcome of his bail application.","html":"Van Druten remains in custody pending the outcome of his bail application."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George Herald will once again apply to film the proceedings.","html":"George Herald will once again apply to film the proceedings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Follow the paper’s online platforms for updates and the latest developments from court.","html":"Follow the paper’s online platforms for updates and the latest developments from court."}]

featuredCaption: Bevan van Druten at his last court appearance on 29 January. Photo: Marguerite van Ginkel
